examples: Marjorie stood on the porch with a big yellow rosette tied around the post.
The leaves formed a dark green rosette.
There is a bull's head rhyton from Mycenae with a gold rosette or sun-burst on its forehead.
Jim Parker, from the Scottish Senior Citizens' Unity Party, was among the crowds, wearing a smiley faced rosette.
Only a fifth of voters received a visit from someone wearing a colourful rosette, according to the British Election Study.
